name_en: The best white key Twilly of the season, paired with milk white is excellent, I've always been missing the best one.
name_cn:
The best white key Twilly of the season, paired with milk white is excellent, I've always been missing the best one.
The polka dots on the Twilly were originally colorful and very eye-catching.

specs.rawTitle:
The best white key Twilly of the season, paired with milk white is excellent, I've always been missing the best one.
The polka dots on the Twilly were originally colorful and very eye-catching.
